thread.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
thread.definitionDraft: Model Context Protocol is an open protocol for connecting AI applications to tools, data sources, prompts, and resources through standardized client-server integrations.
thread.whyNow: Agentic products increasingly need reliable tool and data access, and MCP is becoming a common integration surface across clients, servers, SDKs, and examples.
thread.useBoundary: Focus on the protocol's technical design, official implementations, and product integrations. Exclude financial analysis, company earnings, or generic tool-use discussions without protocol context.

sourceRequirements.companyStrategyContextPolicy: Company strategy sources may be kept only as optional company_strategy_context targets and must not count toward topic readiness.

sources.title: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools
sources.whyRelevant: 松散动机关联（loose motivational link）：Toolformer 是『模型自学用工具』的训练方法，与 MCP（运行时集成协议）只有『为什么模型需要外部工具』这一层松散动机联系，并非 MCP 的直接思想源头。保留作背景，已降权。
sources.evidenceQuote: We introduce Toolformer, a model trained to decide which APIs to call, when to call them, what arguments to pass, and how to best integrate the results.
sources.reviewNotes: URL provided in seed. Tool-use research background only; loose motivational link to MCP, confidence downgraded 0.9->0.55 per source-pack audit (2026-06-20).
sources.text:
Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools

松散动机关联：Toolformer 是模型自学用工具的训练方法，与 MCP（运行时集成协议）仅有为什么模型需要外部工具这一层松散动机联系，并非 MCP 直接思想源头。保留作背景，已降权。

Evidence note: We introduce Toolformer, a model trained to decide which APIs to call, when to call them, what arguments to pass, and how to best integrate the results.

URL provided in seed. Confidence downgraded 0.9->0.55 per audit.

sources.title: Introducing the Model Context Protocol
sources.whyRelevant: MCP 的诞生公告（2024-11-25，Anthropic 官方）。整个主题的源头：含 N×M 集成问题陈述、首批 Python/TypeScript SDK 与预置 server（Google Drive/Slack/GitHub/Git/Postgres/Puppeteer）、Block CTO Dhanji R. Prasanna 背书。补 missing 的 signal 角色与起源叙事。
sources.evidenceQuote: The Model Context Protocol is an open standard that enables developers to build secure, two-way connections between their data sources and AI-powered tools.
sources.reviewNotes: URL web-verified 2026-06-20 (HTTP 200, content matches). Created by David Soria Parra and Justin Spahr-Summers at Anthropic. Seminal origin source.
sources.text:
Introducing the Model Context Protocol

MCP 诞生公告（2024-11-25, Anthropic）。N×M 集成问题、首批 SDK、预置 server、Block CTO 背书。MCP 由 David Soria Parra 与 Justin Spahr-Summers 在 Anthropic 创造。

Evidence note: The Model Context Protocol is an open standard that enables developers to build secure, two-way connections between their data sources and AI-powered tools.

Web-verified 2026-06-20.

sources.title: MCP Architecture overview
sources.whyRelevant: MCP 的技术深度锚：host/client/server 三方架构、JSON-RPC 2.0 数据层、stdio / Streamable HTTP 两种 transport、server primitives（tools/resources/prompts）与 client primitives（sampling/elicitation/logging）。区分『真懂 MCP』与『泛泛而谈』的硬指标，intro 页缺这一层。
sources.evidenceQuote: MCP follows a client-server architecture where an MCP host establishes connections to one or more MCP servers. MCP consists of two layers: a data layer (JSON-RPC based protocol) and a transport layer (stdio and Streamable HTTP).
sources.reviewNotes: URL web-verified 2026-06-20 (HTTP 200). Full-text fetched; confirms three participants, JSON-RPC 2.0, two transports, server/client primitives.
sources.text:
MCP Architecture overview

技术深度锚：host/client/server 三方、JSON-RPC 2.0 数据层、stdio / Streamable HTTP transport、server primitives（tools/resources/prompts）+ client primitives（sampling/elicitation/logging）。

Evidence note: MCP follows a client-server architecture where an MCP host establishes connections to one or more MCP servers. Two layers: data layer (JSON-RPC) and transport layer (stdio / Streamable HTTP).

Web-verified 2026-06-20.

sources.title: One Year of MCP: November 2025 Spec Release
sources.whyRelevant: 官方一周年回顾 + 2025-11-25 spec 发布，补 whyNow 时效性：覆盖 OpenAI（2025-03）与 Google DeepMind 采用、2025-06-18 spec 加 OAuth 安全、2025-09 MCP Registry、2025 末治理移交 Linux Foundation。证明 MCP 已从单厂方案变成事实行业标准。
sources.evidenceQuote: One year after launch, MCP has grown from an internal experiment into an industry standard, with adoption across OpenAI, Google, and a registry of thousands of servers.
sources.reviewNotes: URL per audit; evidence cross-checked against web search (OpenAI 2025-03 adoption, 2025-06-18 spec OAuth, 2025-09 Registry, Linux Foundation governance). Not first-party fulltext captured — quote is paraphrase. Mark source_pack_review.
sources.text:
One Year of MCP: November 2025 Spec Release

官方一周年回顾 + 2025-11-25 spec。覆盖 OpenAI/Google 采用、2025-06-18 OAuth 安全、2025-09 Registry、Linux Foundation 治理。补 whyNow 时效性。

Evidence note (paraphrase, needs verbatim capture): One year after launch, MCP has grown from an internal experiment into an industry standard.

Needs first-party fulltext capture before verified.

sources.title: The Creators of Model Context Protocol
sources.whyRelevant: MCP 两位创造者 David Soria Parra 与 Justin Spahr-Summers 在 Latent Space 的长访谈（主持 swyx / Alessio，2025-04-03）。补 missing 的 transcript_context 角色：讲清 MCP 的设计动机（M×N 集成问题）、与 OpenAPI 的对比、server 实现策略，以及 stateless HTTP / OAuth 授权等路线图。
sources.evidenceQuote: MCP is kind of like the USB-C port of AI applications and that it's meant to be this universal connector to a whole ecosystem.
sources.reviewNotes: URL web-verified 2026-06-20 (HTTP 200, transcript confirmed). Guests David Soria Parra & Justin Spahr-Summers (Anthropic, MCP creators); hosts swyx & Alessio. Long-form origin/design interview supplying the transcript_context role.
sources.text:
The Creators of Model Context Protocol — Latent Space 访谈（2025-04-03）。MCP 创造者 David Soria Parra 与 Justin Spahr-Summers 讲述起源与设计：M×N 集成问题、与 OpenAPI 的对比、server 实现、stateless HTTP 与 OAuth 路线图。

Evidence note: "MCP is kind of like the USB-C port of AI applications ... a universal connector to a whole ecosystem."

Web-verified 2026-06-20.

edges.evidenceNote: The TypeScript SDK implements the protocol defined in the specification repository.
The Python SDK implements the protocol defined in the specification repository.
Claude Code's MCP integration is a product-level implementation of the general protocol described in the main docs.
Research on LLM tool-use motivates the need for standardized tool access, which MCP provides.
The existence and quality of official SDKs signal ecosystem maturity and adoption potential.
The Anthropic launch announcement (2024-11-25) is the origin of the protocol that the official docs now define.
The architecture page provides the technical depth (host/client/server, JSON-RPC 2.0, transports, primitives) behind the high-level intro definition.
The official reference servers implement the protocol defined in the specification repository.
The one-year anniversary recap traces adoption (OpenAI, Google, registry, Linux Foundation governance) from the original launch.
创造者访谈展开了官方诞生公告背后的起源与设计动机，二者互证 MCP 的问题陈述与目标。

review.notes: Generated from Mimo first-pass draft on 2026-06-19. Source-pack audit 2026-06-20: added 4 grounded first-party sources (Anthropic origin announcement [signal], MCP architecture docs [official_definition], reference servers [implementation_signal], 1-year anniversary/2025-11-25 spec [signal]); downgraded Toolformer 0.9->0.55. 'signal' role now filled. STILL NOT READY: (1) transcript_context still empty — need a real first-party transcript (e.g. David Soria Parra / Justin Spahr-Summers talk or a long-form MCP interview); (2) 10 sources vs minimum 15; (3) mcp_reference_servers and mcp_first_anniversary marked source_pack_review/needs_capture pending first-party fulltext capture. Keep source_pack_review.
